config.title: Kreator importu/eksportu z systemu MultiCash
config.script:
'mesagebox #include "50122"
'harui #include "50101"
#include "50209"
'glob_profile #include "50203"
'TRACE #include "50306"
'srvDate #include "50126"
'CFileDrive #include "50211"
'choose_rejestr_dok #include "50517"
#ifdef _DEBUG #ifndef MACRO_MCASHTRACE TRACE2FILE_NAME(mcashtrace) #macro MCASHTRACE(message) TRACE2FILE("mcash.log", message, mcashtrace) #define MACRO_MCASHTRACE #endif #else #ifndef MCASHTRACE #define MCASHTRACE ' #endif #endif
class CMultiCacheWizard
public m_strFileName public m_bImport public m_dDataOper public m_eFileFormat public m_pRejestrDok
Private Sub class_initialize()
dim strProf:strProf = getglobprofile(GLOBPROF_MULTICASH_DATE) if strProf = "" then m_dDataOper = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() else m_dDataOper = cdate(strProf) end if if trans_.var(APPVAR_MODE) = MULTICASH_WIZZARD_IMPORT then m_bImport = true m_eFileFormat = clng(1) else m_strFileName = get_suggested_path() m_bImport = false end if 'rejestr dokumentów m_pRejestrDok = 0 end sub
public function get_suggested_path() 'compose new suggested file name dim pFD, bOK set pFD = CFileDrive(bOK) if (not bOK) then view_message 6161, 0 end if
dim strStartFile : strStartFile = "polecenia" +_ "_z_" + CStr(Year(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Month(Now)) + "_" + CStr(Day(Now)) + ".pli"
dim strStartPath : strStartPath = pFD.GetPath( m_strFileName ) if (strStartPath="") then strStartPath="c:\" end if if right(strStartPath,1) <> "\" then strStartPath = strStartPath + "\" end if get_suggested_path = strStartPath + strStartFile end function
end class
dim pParamClass
function fopen() if trans_.var(APPVAR_MODE) = MULTICASH_WIZZARD_IMPORT then if HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_WIZZARD_MULTICASH_IMPORT)) then run_this 'uruchom modul automatycznie end if else if HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_WIZZARD_MULTICASH_EKSPORT)) then run_this 'uruchom modul automatycznie end if end if fopen=false end function
function run_this() dim pWizzard set pParamClass = new CMultiCacheWizard
set pWizzard=CWizzard(false) pWizzard.add_container pParamClass
pWizzard.add_step PAGE_FORM_WIZZARD_MULTICASH_START pWizzard.add_step PAGE_FORM_WIZZARD_MULTICASH_FILE if not pParamClass.m_bImport then pWizzard.add_step PAGE_FORM_WIZZARD_MULTICASH_FILTR end if pWizzard.add_step PAGE_FORM_WIZZARD_MULTICASH_END
pWizzard.run
end function
function onPageEnter(pWizzardPage) select case ( pWizzardPage.m_nPage ) end select end function
function onPageExit(pWizzardPage) onPageExit=PAGE_DEFAULT select case ( pWizzardPage.m_nPage ) case PAGE_FORM_WIZZARD_MULTICASH_FILTR 'wybierz rejestr z którego eksportowac dane dim idRejestr : idRejestr = choose_rejestr_dok("N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY", true, "Wybór rejestru") if idRejestr > 0 then pParamClass.m_pRejestrDok = idRejestr end if case PAGE_FORM_WIZZARD_MULTICASH_FILE if pParamClass.m_strFileName = "" then onPageExit=PAGE_DONOTEXIT end if end select end function
function onPageInit(pWizzardPage) select case ( pWizzardPage.m_nPage ) end select end function
function onWizzardComplete(pWizzardPage): onWizzardComplete = false
dim pMCashModule:set pMCashModule = doc_.getmodule(60219)
if pParamClass.m_bImport then dim pInputStream:set pInputStream = doc_.createstreamobj() pInputStream.attach pParamClass.m_strFileName
dim bInitRes : bInitRes = false select case pParamClass.m_eFileFormat case MULTICASH_IMPORT_FORMAT_MILLENIUM_MT940 'import Millenium - format MT940 bInitRes = pMCashModule.init_import_Millenium_MT940(pInputStream) case MULTICASH_IMPORT_FORMAT_MILLENIUM_AIPP4 'import Millenium - format AIPP-4 bInitRes = pMCashModule.init_import_Millenium_AIPP4(pInputStream) case MULTICASH_IMPORT_FORMAT_ING_MT942 bInitRes = pMCashModule.init_import_ING_MT942(pInputStream) case MULTICASH_IMPORT_FORMAT_RAIFFEISEN_MT940 bInitRes = pMCashModule.init_import_Raifeissen_MT940(pInputStream) case MULTICASH_IMPORT_FORMAT_BNPPARIBAS_MT940 bInitRes = pMCashModule.init_import_BNPParibas_MT940(pInputStream) end select
' if instr(UCase(pParamClass.m_strFileName),".TXT") > 0 then ' elseif instr(UCase(pParamClass.m_strFileName),".MT940") > 0 then ' bInitRes = pMCashModule.init_MultiCash_import_MT940(pInputStream) 'Import plików *.MT940 ' elseif instr(UCase(pParamClass.m_strFileName),".STA") > 0 then ' bInitRes = pMCashModule.init_MultiCash_import_STA(pInputStream) 'Import plików *.STA ' elseif instr(UCase(pParamClass.m_strFileName),".EXP") > 0 then ' pParamClass.m_eFileFormat = 2 ' bInitRes = pMCashModule.init_VideoTelFormat2_import(pInputStream) 'Import plików *.EXP ' else ' pParamClass.m_eFileFormat = 1 ' bInitRes = pMCashModule.init_MultiCash_import(pInputStream) 'Import plików *.PLI ' end if
if bInitRes then if not pMCashModule.process_import(pParamClass.m_pRejestrDok) then MessageBox "Import poleceń nie udał się", "Multicash", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if end if
MessageBox "Import danych zakończony", "Multicash", vbOKOnly, vbInformation
else dim pOutputStream:set pOutputStream = doc_.createstreamobj() dim strRejDok : strRejDok = "select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp=N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY" if pParamClass.m_pRejestrDok > 0 then strRejDok = CStr(pParamClass.m_pRejestrDok) end if dim strWhere:strWhere = " ( pRejestrDok in (" + strRejDok + ") and (eStatus = 1) and (curKwotaPodm<0) ) " if pParamClass.m_dDataOper <> trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() then strWhere = strWhere + " and ( dDataOper > "+ trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(pParamClass.m_dDataOper) +" )" end if
dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5PLATNOSC,strWhere,"","") if not cursor.exists(1) then MessageBox "Eksport wpisów bankowych nie udał się - brakuje wpisów odpowiadających kryterium", "Multicash", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if if pMCashModule.init_MultiCash_export(cursor) then if not pMCashModule.process_export(pOutputStream) then MessageBox "Eksport wpisów bankowych nie udał się - przerwano analizę danych lub format niektórych informacji w bazie jest nieprawidłowy", "Multicash", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if pOutputStream.save pParamClass.m_strFileName 'zapisujemy datę, do ktorej eksportowaliśmy setglobprofile GLOBPROF_MULTICASH_DATE,cstr(srvDate) trans_.saveobjects() end if MessageBox "Eksport danych zakończony", "Multicash", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if
onWizzardComplete = true
end function
